response.justification: Bogdan is a technically exceptional senior engineer with strong developer tools and infrastructure expertise highly relevant to the role's focus areas. However, the position explicitly requires 2 years of people management and 3 years of technical leadership experience, neither of which are evident in his resume. His career has consistently followed individual contributor paths with frequent company changes, and his current role remains technical rather than managerial. Without demonstrated team leadership, people development, and organizational change experience, he does not meet the critical baseline requirements for a full-time people-leadership manager position.
strengths: 16+ years of software development across multiple domains with strong architectural and system design expertise demonstrated through diverse technical roles
Deep hands-on experience building developer tools, CI/CD infrastructure, test frameworks, and platforms that support engineering productivity
Mobile platform knowledge and proven ability to ship production-quality code (e.g., iOS app ranked top 10 in US)
concerns: Zero demonstrated people management experience; resume shows only individual contributor roles despite seniority level, missing the required 2 years of team leadership
No evidence of setting team priorities, managing performance, conducting development conversations, or growing and coaching team members—core responsibilities of the role
Career pattern of 1-3 year tenures across many companies with no progression into management positions suggests preference for technical depth over organizational leadership

key_factors.factor: Lack of demonstrated team leadership track record
